query: (("weather forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "meteorological forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "temperature forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "early warning system"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat warning"[Title/Abstract] OR "weather alert"[Title/Abstract] OR "climate information"[Title/Abstract] OR "forecasting intervention"[Title/Abstract] OR "predictive information"[Title/Abstract] OR "weather communication"[Title/Abstract] OR "meteorological information"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat advisory"[Title/Abstract] OR "temperature alert"[Title/Abstract] OR "Weather Forecasting"[MeSH]) OR ("cooling center"[Title/Abstract] OR "cooling shelter"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat shelter"[Title/Abstract] OR "air conditioning center"[Title/Abstract] OR "climate refuge"[Title/Abstract] OR "cooling station"[Title/Abstract] OR "community cooling"[Title/Abstract] OR "public cooling"[Title/Abstract] OR "emergency shelter"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat relief center"[Title/Abstract] OR "Air Conditioning"[MeSH])) AND ("temperature-mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "thermal stress"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-related death"[Title/Abstract] OR hyperthermia[Title/Abstract] OR "heat stroke"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat illness"[Title/Abstract] OR "extreme temperature"[Title/Abstract] OR "ambient temperature"[Title/Abstract] OR "temperature exposure"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat exposure"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat wave"[Title/Abstract] OR "Hot Temperature"[MeSH] OR "Heat Stress Disorders"[MeSH] OR "Mortality"[MeSH]) AND (("randomized controlled trial"[Title/Abstract] OR RCT[Title/Abstract] OR "quasi-experimental"[Title/Abstract] OR "natural experiment"[Title/Abstract] OR "regression discontinuity"[Title/Abstract] OR "instrumental variable"[Title/Abstract] OR "difference-in-difference"[Title/Abstract] OR "randomized assignment"[Title/Abstract] OR "causal inference"[Title/Abstract] OR "causal identification"[Title/Abstract] OR "exogenous variation"[Title/Abstract] OR "plausibly exogenous"[Title/Abstract] OR "treatment assignment"[Title/Abstract] OR "policy evaluation"[Title/Abstract] OR "intervention study"[Title/Abstract] OR "program evaluation"[Title/Abstract] OR "Randomized Controlled Trial"[Publication Type]) OR ("interrupted time series"[Title/Abstract] OR "before-after"[Title/Abstract] OR "propensity score"[Title/Abstract] OR "matching study"[Title/Abstract] OR "fixed effects"[Title/Abstract] OR "event study"[Title/Abstract] OR "regression kink"[Title/Abstract] OR "synthetic control"[Title/Abstract] OR "Interrupted Time Series Analysis"[MeSH]))
